title: Petesioides yunquense
taxonomy: Petesioides yunquense is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It is native to the island of Puerto Rico. Within the kingdom Plantae, Petesioides yunquense is classified as a member of the clade Angiosperms, further categorizing it as a Eudicots. As a member of the family Euphorbiaceae, Petesioides yunquense is part of the subfamily Crotonoideae. This classification provides a general understanding of the plant's evolutionary relationships within the plant kingdom.
